privileged_info_summary: This task operates on a local OpenSIS (open-source Student Information System) installation running on MariaDB. All data is synthetic, created via SQL INSERT statements during task setup. The staff member (Dr. Evelyn Park, epark@school.edu, Teacher profile) does not exist in real life. The three students (Sophie Walsh born 2005-04-10, Kevin O'Brien born 2005-07-23, Maya Rodriguez born 2005-11-05) are synthetic Grade 12 records created in the opensis database. The course (Advanced Biology, code BIO401, Science subject, Grade 12, 1.0 credits) is synthetic. All metadata values are accurate and verified against task.json description, README.md specifications, verifier.py expected data structures, and setup_task.sh data creation scripts. Pass threshold is verified at 60 points (minimum score needed to pass task).
